alternatives.name: Multi-MWh Li-ion BESS EPC
alternatives.tradeoffs: ['CAPEX €250-400/kWh', 'thermal-runaway risk', '6-12 mo cert lead', 'MV grid required']

alternatives.name: Diesel/gas standby genset only
alternatives.tradeoffs: ['diesel cost & CO2', '60-120 s start delay', 'no peak-shave revenue', 'BImSchV emission limits']

alternatives.name: DSO grid-capacity upgrade
alternatives.tradeoffs: ['1-3 yr DSO lead', 'may be denied in saturated feeders', 'no resilience benefit', 'recurring Netzentgelte']

alternatives.name: Behind-the-meter PV + minimal storage
alternatives.tradeoffs: ['cannot cover 24/7 reefer baseload', 'intermittent', 'weather-dependent', 'no real peak-shave headroom']

alternatives.name: Do nothing — pay demand charges & accept outage risk
